models.title: Schluter Ditra-Heat Membrane Sheet 3ft.3in. X 2ft.7in.
source_fields:
Ditra-Heat Is An Uncoupling And Waterproofing Membrane Specifically Designed To Secure Ditra-Heat-E-Hk Electric Floor Heating Cables In Place.
  • Provides heating and uncoupling in a single layer prevents tiles and grout from cracking
  • Easily customizable: place heating cables exactly where they are needed
  • No self-levelers required to encapsulate cables
  • Minimizes assembly thickness for easy transitions to lower surface coverings

models.title: Schluter 16sqft. Ditra Heat 120V Heating Cable
source_fields:
Ditra-Heat-E-Hk Are Floor Heating Cables Designed For The Ditra-Heat Electric Floor Warming System.
  • Cables snap into the membrane; clips and fasteners are not required
  • No self-levelers required to encapsulate the cables; installation time significantly reduced
  • Produces virtually zero electromagnetic fields
  • No return to thermostat required

models.title: Laticrete Strata Heat 120V Heat Wire 26sqft.
source_fields:
Laticrete Strata Heat 120V Heat Wire 26sqft. is an electric floor heating solution designed for easier installation and reliable performance. With a spliceless design, it eliminates the need for burying cold leads, making setup faster and more efficient.

  • Component of the Laticrete Lifetime System Warranty
  • Spliceless design simplifies installation
  • No cutting required in the mat or subfloor to bury the cold lead
  • Multiple spacing options provide flexibility in heat output
  • UL-recognized appliance wiring material for safety and performance

Laticrete Strata Heat 120V Heat Wire 26sqft. offers a straightforward way to add floor heating to your project with flexibility and peace of mind. Backed by the Laticrete Lifetime System Warranty, it’s built for long-term reliability.

models.title: Schluter Ditra-Heat Membrane Roll 3ft.3in. X 41ft.1in.
source_fields: Schluter DITRA-HEAT integrates customizable, comfortable electric floor warming with the functions associated with DITRA: uncoupling, waterproofing, vapor management, and support to ensure a long lasting installation.

models.title: Schluter 42.7sqft. Ditra Heat 120V Heating Cable
source_fields:
Schluter®-DITRA-HEAT-E-HK are twisted pair heating cables designed for integration with the DITRA-HEAT uncoupling membrane in interior floor warming applications.
  • Do not purchase a heating cable the same size as the area to be tiled; this will be too much heating cable!
  • Very important: Never CUT the heating cable. This would change the cable resistance and could lead to a fire.
  • The heating cable section of the cable must be entirely installed under the floor covering. In order to prevent a fire hazard, do not install it anywhere else (e.g., in a wall).
  • Never install heating cable under vanities, bathtub platforms, kitchen cabinets and islands or any other fixtures. Excessive heat could build up in these confined spaces and may cause a fire .
